headline.text: L3 ML4 scraper blade missing since *April 3rd* — spares on order; three other damage events open across L1 and L3.

summary: Four equipment-damage events: L3 ML4 scraper blade missing for 2+ months, L1 S2 separator-belt damage with no follow-up, L3 Dorner 1 conveyor damage pending Monday inspection, and L1 S3 Tunnel 1 dirty rollers affecting belt tracking. L3 ML1 demolding-belt damage was trimmed and resolved on second shift.

food_safety.title: Separator table belt damaged on S2
food_safety.summary: Belt on S2 separator table shows damage of unknown origin; no follow-up or inspection visible in window.
food_safety.status: Open, no follow-up visible in window.

food_safety.title: Scraper blade missing on ML4 since April 3rd
food_safety.summary: Scraper blade on ML4 has been missing for over two months; maintenance confirming no spares available and ordering replacements.

food_safety.title: Demolding belt damaged on ML1
food_safety.summary: QA observed damage on ML1 demolding belt at Imperial discharge; maintenance trimmed belt on shift and cleared for continued use.
food_safety.status: Resolved on shift — belt trimmed by maintenance.

food_safety.title: Dorner 1 conveyor damaged on ML4
food_safety.summary: Dorner 1 conveyor on ML4 reported damaged; full inspection and replacement decision deferred to Monday.

quality.title: Tunnel 2 left without filter on S2
quality.summary: S2 Tunnel 2 was left without a filter after cleaning or changeover; no follow-up on installation visible in window.
quality.status: Open, no follow-up visible in window.

sanitation.title: Dirty rollers affecting Tunnel 1 belt tracking on S3
sanitation.summary: Tunnel 1 belt on S3 tracking west due to dirty rollers; maintenance adjusted tension but rollers need cleaning at next stop.
sanitation.status: Open, continuing to run — cleaning deferred to next scheduled stop.

sanitation.title: C6 cross conveyor allergen test on S2
sanitation.summary: C6 cross conveyor on S2 cleaned and held pending allergen verification; passed allergen test and cleared for use.

opportunities.text: Consider flagging tunnel filter installation in S2 startup checklist — Tunnel 2 was left without filter after cleaning.
Consider adding scraper-blade inspection to ML4 startup checklist — today's missing blade had been absent since April 3rd.
Review belt-splice quality expectations with C&E — ML1 demolding belt installed two weeks ago already showed wear at connection point.
